# Algo CLI

> Algo CLI is a local-first agent runtime for tools, durable context, routed agents, and verified work.

Canonical site: https://algo-cli.com/
Documentation: https://algo-cli.com/docs
Install status: https://algo-cli.com/install
Benchmark methodology: https://algo-cli.com/benchmarks
Security: https://algo-cli.com/security
Release manifest: https://algo-cli.com/api/v1/releases/stable.json
Document index: https://algo-cli.com/docs/index.json
Benchmark summary: https://algo-cli.com/benchmarks/summary.json
Runtime discovery: https://algo-cli.com/.well-known/algo-cli.json

## Operating principles

- Core operation remains local and does not require this website.
- Remote documentation and registries must be explicit, versioned inputs.
- The website does not receive prompts, files, memories, or identity records from Algo CLI.
- Benchmark claims are scoped to their published protocol and evidence.
